headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $22
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $20 to $22.
